practice_interpretation: Primary issuer disclosures are represented and usable as durable company-fact anchors.
Regulatory, exchange, and official filing routes are represented.
Official macro and industry data sources are represented.
Price, trading, options, holder, and market snapshot sources are represented.
Aggregator financial-data sources are represented and explicitly secondary.
Consensus/estimate coverage exists but remains a strategic data dependency.
Institutional interpretation and forecast sources are represented.
Professional and industry media discovery/context sources are represented.
Supply-chain and ecosystem signal sources are represented after this run.
Social and creator signal sources are represented with signal-only role.
Local user material is represented through a restricted source-note template.
Derived Mira artifacts are represented and require upstream links.
